header: S. S. da Grama (SP) / Pocos de Caldas (MG)

lesson.menu_desc: Social Invitations -- How about & Why don't we -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 18 -- Making Plans -- Social Invitations
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Tuca Dias | Aula 18 -- Making Plans

listenings.text: Hi Tuca, it is Daniel. I hope you are doing well. I am calling because I would love to invite you to a small get-together at my place this Saturday. It is a special occasion: it is my birthday. Nothing big, just a few close friends, a relaxed evening with good food and good conversation. So, how about coming over around seven? And why don't we have dinner together, instead of just snacks? I am the host, so I will do all the cooking, which means you do not need to bring anything. Just bring yourself. I am also inviting a few other guests you know, so it will be a lovely little gathering. Please let me know if you are available, and reply by Thursday if you can, so I know how many people to cook for. I really hope you can accept. It would not be the same without you. Talk soon. Bye.

Hey Tuca, it is Sofia. Listen, you invited me to Daniel's get-together on Saturday, and I feel terrible, but I have to turn it down. I am simply not available that weekend. My sister is getting married out of town, so I will be away the whole time. I am so sad to miss the occasion, because Daniel is such a wonderful host and I love a relaxed gathering with good friends. Could you do me a favor? Please wish him a very happy birthday from me, and tell him I will celebrate with him properly when I am back. And here is an idea for the two of us: how about meeting for coffee the following week, once I am home again? I really want to hear all about the party. Let me know what works for you. Have a great time on Saturday, and give everyone my love. Bye for now.

extra_audio.text: First, Tuca got an invitation from Daniel to a get-together for his birthday. Then she replied and said she would love to accept, because she was available on Saturday. After that, Daniel suggested coming over around seven, and Tuca asked why don't we invite Sofia too. Next, Daniel said he would send Sofia an invitation, so they would be a few guests for a relaxed gathering. Finally, they agreed on the plan, and Tuca thanked him for the lovely invitation.
